_metadata.case_study: Formula Student upright — BESO topology optimisation
_metadata.paper: Structural optimization principles for edge AI in motorsport telemetry
_metadata.objective: minimise compliance (maximise stiffness) subject to volume constraint

stages.label: initial_design
stages.description: Full solid design space before optimisation

stages.label: beso_30pct_removal
stages.description: 30 % least-sensitive elements removed by BESO sensitivity criterion
stages.notes: Material below yield at static case; dynamic margin narrow

stages.label: beso_55pct_removal
stages.notes: Stiffness degradation 11 % vs baseline — approaching limit

stages.label: beso_65pct_removal_final
stages.notes: Structural FoS >= 1.0; mass 65 % below initial; manufacturable by SLM

k_h_correspondence.description: K↔H sensitivity correspondence — structural stiffness matrix K maps to PTQ loss Hessian H
k_h_correspondence.structural_sensitivity: element strain energy density (removes low-sensitivity elements)
k_h_correspondence.digital_sensitivity: Hessian-weighted activation magnitude (GPTQ/AWQ removes low-sensitivity weights)

analogy.H: loss Hessian governing perplexity after quantisation
analogy.element_removal: binary BESO decision — element in or out
analogy.weight_quantisation: INT4 bit assignment — low-sensitivity weights get 4-bit encoding
